title: Dark Glacite Tunnels
description: A resource pack for Hypixel Skyblock bringing dark mode to the Glacite Tunnels
body:
![Resource pack banner image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90c93eb2729cbced790678b1e971b27861ab99f9.png)
## Overview
The Dark Glacite Tunnels resource pack reduces the brightness for all relevant textures in the **Glacite Tunnels**.

Perfect for players who prefer a _low light_ mining experience.

![Gallery 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a648016b7c10826bdedf5229489fca0874d70b7e.png)

## Gallery Overview
The gallery includes screenshots of the Dark Glacite Tunnels resource pack, as well as some extra screenshots with my gemstone resource pack in the same locations.

_Gemstone resource pack:_ https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/gemstone-pack

![gemstone_title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59a2b3cba4b7eecbd75262f1f11af499e4f85ba6.png)

### Example comparison (With & Without Gemstone resource Pack)
_(See more examples in the gallery)_
| Without Gemstone Pack | With Gemstone Pack |
|----------------------|---------------------|
| ![image 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2dcc5fca79f45ca0e29a6ba1ae652930ad36e926_0.webp) | ![image 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7adb783a83b0f0e5114e2e6598fcce5f4c712601_0.webp) |

## Extra
The Dark Glacite Tunnels resource pack is just an overlay, making it compatible with most Skyblock resource packs.
